sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n82376" key="peritomeu/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">περιτομ-εύς</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">έως</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n82376.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">shoemaker's knife</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:7:83" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Poll.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">7.83</biblScope></bibl>,<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:10:141" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">10.141</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
